findings.project_classification: Monolith web, 1 part, Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 4 + Supabase + Claude AI

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith web (Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript). 63 source files, 6 SQL migrations, 13 DB tables.
Found 11 existing docs (PRD, BUILD_PLAN, VISION, README, CLAUDE.md x5, KICKOFF). User focus: AI system.
Technology stack analyzed: 20+ technologies identified. Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind 4, Supabase 2.98, Anthropic SDK 0.78, Leaflet, web-push.
Exhaustive source scan complete. 4 parallel agents analyzed all 63+ source files. All scan data in memory.
project-overview.md written (executive summary, metrics, tech stack, status).
source-tree-analysis.md written (annotated directory tree with line counts).
architecture.md written (tech stack, rendering, auth, state, offline, deployment).
ai-system.md written (FOCUS AREA — prompts, tools, agentic loop, triggers, memory, routes, briefings). Deep dive document.
api-contracts.md (9 endpoints), data-models.md (13 tables), component-inventory.md (20 components), development-guide.md (setup/deploy).
index.md written (master index with reading order suggestions).
Validation complete. All 8 documents generated. No incomplete markers.
